title: Internal error in internal cell is found in case when use "setparam -type" command

features.name: module with parameter and ternary mux operator
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter declaration and a ternary operator used as a mux in a continuous assignment
features.snippet:
parameter WIDTH = 1;
assign cout = cin ? y : x;

features.name: submodule instantiation with positional port connections
features.description: Code should include a submodule instantiated with positional port connections in the parent module
features.snippet:
wire o;
middle u_mid (x, y, o);

features.name: clocked always block with posedge and non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block triggered on a posedge edge with a non-blocking assignment to a register output
